parameters.//comment-environmentName: Used as a suffix on resource names. Use 'production' or 'dev'.
parameters.//comment-baseName: Resource-name prefix. Keep short and lowercase.
parameters.//comment-appServiceSku: Linux App Service Plan SKU. B1 for dev; S1 or P0v3 for small-church production.
parameters.//comment-sqlSku: Azure SQL Database SKU. Basic for dev; S0 for small-church production.
parameters.//comment-sqlAdminPassword: REPLACE before deploy. Strong password required by Azure SQL (12+ chars, upper, lower, digit, symbol).
parameters.//comment-customDomain: Optional. If set, PublicSite:BaseUrl uses https://<customDomain>.
